assignments.name: guest_info
delivery_address
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const out = $('Extraer Datos Estructurados').first().json.output; const parsed = (typeof out === 'string') ? (() => { try { return JSON.parse(out.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)?.[0] || '{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } })() : (out || {}); const addr = (parsed?.Direccion || parsed?.direccion || '').trim().replace(/[\n\r]/g, ''); return addr || null; })() }}

assignments.name: total
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const out = $('Extraer Datos Estructurados').first().json.output; const parsed = (typeof out === 'string') ? (() => { try { return JSON.parse(out.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)?.[0] || '{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } })() : (out || {}); return parsed?.total_final || 0; })() }}

assignments.name: items
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const out = $('Extraer Datos Estructurados').first().json.output; const parsed = (typeof out === 'string') ? (() => { try { return JSON.parse(out.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)?.[0] || '{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } })() : (out || {}); return { detalle: parsed?.detalle_pedido || '', metodo_pago: parsed?.['Metodo de pago'] || parsed?.metodo_pago || '' }; })() }}

assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const out = $('Extraer Datos Estructurados').first().json.output; const parsed = (typeof out === 'string') ? (() => { try { return JSON.parse(out.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)?.[0] || '{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } })() : (out || {}); return (parsed?.Nombre || parsed?.nombre || 'Cliente').trim().replace(/[\n\r]/g, ''); })() }}
